meta.name: Prospereum Factory Upgrade — STEP 1 of 3: scheduleUpgrade(newReImpl)
meta.description: Schedules the RewardEngine implementation upgrade to the new impl (which adds scheduleSetFactory, clearVaultScores, etc.). Starts 7-day upgrade timelock. FILL IN newReImpl address from DeployFactoryUpgrade.s.sol output before importing.

contractInputsValues.newImplementation: FILL_IN: newReImpl address from DeployFactoryUpgrade output
